config.greeting-key.name: Greeting Key
config.greeting-key.desc: Press this key to actively greet nearby villagers.
config.search-radius.name: Greeting Distance
config.search-radius.desc: The maximum distance in tiles for villagers to hear your greeting (default is 7).
config.allow-greeting-talked.name: Allow Interaction with Talked NPCs
config.allow-greeting-talked.desc: If enabled, you can still greet villagers from a distance even if you have already talked to them manually today.
config.turn-delay.name: NPC Turn Delay
config.turn-delay.desc: The number of seconds before an NPC turns their head to look at you after you greet them.
config.bubble-delay.name: NPC Bubble Delay
config.bubble-delay.desc: The number of seconds before a speech bubble pops up above an NPC's head after you greet them.
generic.base: ...Hm? Do you need something from me?
generic.low.spring.sun.morning.1: Morning. The spring morning air is nice, but I have to get to work.
generic.low.spring.sun.morning.2: Good morning. A new season has started, the farm must be pretty busy, right?
generic.low.spring.sun.morning.3: Good morning. It's windy in spring, and the road is full of catkins. Be careful not to get them in your eyes.
generic.low.spring.sun.morning.4: Morning. The early morning sun is a bit blinding, a new day has started again.
generic.low.spring.sun.morning.5: Oh, morning. I see you're up early. New farmers are indeed hard-working.
generic.low.spring.rain.afternoon.1: It's been raining since noon... My clothes feel sticky, it really saps my energy.
generic.low.spring.rain.afternoon.2: Good afternoon. It's slippery on rainy days in spring. You didn't trip on your way from the farm, did you?
generic.low.spring.rain.afternoon.3: Another rainy day. The town is as quiet as ever, everyone is hiding at home.
generic.low.spring.rain.afternoon.4: Good afternoon. Even the birds aren't singing in this kind of weather. The whole town feels so dull.
generic.low.spring.rain.afternoon.5: Rainy days are such a pain. The muddy ground makes a mess of my shoes, I have to go now.
generic.low.spring.storm.night.1: This spring thunder is way too loud. It's so late, aren't you going back to the farm?
generic.low.spring.storm.night.2: The lightning tonight is terrifying, feels like the whole window is shaking. Stay safe.
generic.low.spring.storm.night.3: Thundery nights are no joke. You'd better find a place to shelter from the rain quickly.
generic.low.spring.storm.night.4: Wandering around this late? It wouldn't be fun if you got struck by lightning.
generic.low.spring.storm.night.5: It's late, and visibility is terrible in the thunderstorm. I'm heading back, you should get some rest too.
generic.low.summer.sun.afternoon.1: Good afternoon. The summer sun is just brutal, make sure to prevent heatstroke.
generic.low.summer.sun.afternoon.2: Good afternoon. It's boiling hot... I really envy you staying on the farm, there's so much tree shade to hide in.
generic.low.summer.sun.afternoon.3: Feels like the whole asphalt road is melting, summer is really hard to endure.
generic.low.summer.sun.afternoon.4: Walking outside in this blazing heat is pure torture. If you don't have anything else, I'll be leaving first.
generic.low.summer.sun.afternoon.5: Good afternoon. Sweating buckets just by moving a bit, I really want to go to the beach to catch a breeze.
generic.low.summer.rain.morning.1: Morning. Even when it rains, summer is still so muggy and uncomfortable.
generic.low.summer.rain.morning.2: Good morning. Though the rain saves you time watering, this sticky air is just despairing.
generic.low.summer.rain.morning.3: Morning. Summer downpours always come so suddenly, remember to bring an umbrella when you go out.
generic.low.summer.rain.morning.4: Good morning. The rain hitting my face feels warm, it doesn't feel like it's cooling down at all.
generic.low.summer.rain.morning.5: Morning. Rainy days aren't suitable for staying outside, I need to find a place to shelter.
generic.low.summer.greenrain.afternoon.1: This green rain... what on earth is going on? Tentacles and moss everywhere, it's so creepy...
generic.low.summer.greenrain.afternoon.2: Good afternoon. Did you see the mutated plants on Pierre's roof? It's absolutely hair-raising.
generic.low.summer.greenrain.afternoon.3: This green fog always makes it feel hard to breathe, is this even scientific?
generic.low.summer.greenrain.afternoon.4: Good afternoon. How did those big trees suddenly become like monsters? What's wrong with this world...
generic.low.summer.greenrain.afternoon.5: This creepy moss all over the place has completely blocked the roads, what a headache.
generic.low.summer.greenrain.night.1: It's dark, and this green light looks even more terrifying. You'd better not wander around outside either.
generic.low.summer.greenrain.night.2: The night sky is unsettlingly green tonight, I keep feeling like something in the woods is staring at me...
generic.low.summer.greenrain.night.3: Why are you still out this late? This green rainy night looks unsafe no matter how you view it.
generic.low.summer.greenrain.night.4: The tentacle plants at night seem to be moving? Good lord, I must go home right away and lock the door tight.
generic.low.summer.greenrain.night.5: Late night paired with this green light, it's like a horror movie scene. Excuse me, I'll take my leave.
generic.low.fall.sun.afternoon.1: Good afternoon. Autumn is the harvest season, right? Wishing your farm a great harvest.
generic.low.fall.sun.afternoon.2: Good afternoon. The autumn wind is starting to carry a chill, though the golden fallen leaves look quite nice.
generic.low.fall.sun.afternoon.3: The weather is nice today, many people must be busy preparing for the Stardew Valley Fair.
generic.low.fall.sun.afternoon.4: Good afternoon. Autumn sunsets come very early, a whole day passes before you know it.
generic.low.fall.sun.afternoon.5: How are the crops growing? Once autumn passes, this year is basically over, isn't it?
generic.low.fall.rain.night.1: Autumn rainy nights are already starting to feel a bit cold. Excuse me, I'll take my leave.
generic.low.fall.rain.night.2: Good evening. It's easy to catch a cold if you get caught in the night rain, you should head back to the farm.
generic.low.fall.rain.night.3: Walking around listening to the rain is indeed a bit cold, I'd still prefer to stay in a warm room.
generic.low.fall.rain.night.4: The late-night autumn rain makes one feel a bit lonely, everyone went home to sleep early.
generic.low.fall.rain.night.5: The wind is blowing fallen leaves all over, and it's raining too. I need to hurry up and leave.
generic.low.fall.storm.afternoon.1: This awful weather changes on a dime, sudden thundershowers are so annoying.
generic.low.fall.storm.afternoon.2: Good afternoon. This thunder scared all the birds out of the woods, doesn't seem like a good omen.
generic.low.fall.storm.afternoon.3: Thunder in the middle of the afternoon, my clothes got completely soaked by the sudden downpour, what bad luck.
generic.low.fall.storm.afternoon.4: Good afternoon. Don't stand under big trees during a thunderstorm, go take shelter in the saloon or the science lab.
generic.low.fall.storm.afternoon.5: The wild wind is swirling fallen leaves everywhere, accompanied by lightning, what a terrible afternoon.
generic.low.winter.snow.morning.1: Morning. Winter mornings are always so cold, even the road surface is frozen.
generic.low.winter.snow.morning.2: Good morning. You can't grow crops on the farm in winter, right? What are you up to, waking up so early?
generic.low.winter.snow.morning.3: Morning. Every breath turns into white mist, this season makes me just want to hide in bed and never come out.
generic.low.winter.snow.morning.4: Good morning. The snow is too thick, even walking has become exceptionally exhausting today.
generic.low.winter.snow.morning.5: Morning. My hands are about to freeze stiff, I need to find somewhere with a fireplace to warm up.
generic.low.winter.snow.night.1: On a freezing snowy day, you should be staying indoors properly at night, shouldn't you?
generic.low.winter.snow.night.2: Good evening. The snow outside is starting to harden, if you don't go back now, the road will be even harder to walk.
generic.low.winter.snow.night.3: Staying out in the snow this late, is your body made of iron?
generic.low.winter.snow.night.4: The late-night snowy dark is a bit scary quiet, I advise you to go back early and light the fireplace.
generic.low.winter.snow.night.5: The cold wind gives me a headache, I'll take off first. See you around.
generic.low.winter.sun.afternoon.1: Even though the sun is out, the winter wind still cuts like a knife against my face.
generic.low.winter.sun.afternoon.2: Good afternoon. The winter sun has absolutely no warmth, it just looks a bit brighter, that's all.
generic.low.winter.sun.afternoon.3: Good afternoon. A clear day is always better than snowing, at least visibility is improved.
generic.low.winter.sun.afternoon.4: Even with sunshine, the accumulated snow shows no signs of melting at all, it's still freezing cold.
generic.low.winter.sun.afternoon.5: Good afternoon. The wind is too strong, I don't want to stay outside for too long today.
generic.mid.spring.sun.morning.1: Good morning, {{playerName}}! The weather is so nice today, it's perfect for getting a lot of work done with full enthusiasm!
generic.mid.spring.sun.morning.2: Morning, {{playerName}}! See those newly sprouted saplings? Spring is truly here!
generic.mid.spring.sun.morning.3: Good morning! The weather is so wonderful, are you planning to go down the mines or clear weeds on the farm today?
generic.mid.spring.sun.morning.4: Hey, {{playerName}}, morning! The morning air is full of floral scents, today will definitely go great!
generic.mid.spring.sun.morning.5: Good morning! You look well, let's work hard together for a new day!
generic.mid.spring.rain.afternoon.1: Good afternoon! Spring rain nurtures all things, the seeds you planted must be drinking their fill today.
generic.mid.spring.rain.afternoon.2: Good afternoon, {{playerName}}. A rainy day is perfect for reading while listening to the rain. Did you give yourself a day off today?
generic.mid.spring.rain.afternoon.3: The heavy rain washed the town clean. Good afternoon, did you not bring an umbrella today?
generic.mid.spring.rain.afternoon.4: Good afternoon! Although going out in the rain is a bit troublesome, thinking about how the crops don't need watering makes it quite worth it, haha.
generic.mid.spring.rain.afternoon.5: Hey, {{playerName}}, good afternoon. There's always a special kind of tranquility in town on rainy days, feels quite nice.
generic.mid.spring.storm.night.1: Wow, the lightning tonight is intense. Don't run around on the open farm, stay safe!
generic.mid.spring.storm.night.2: Good evening, {{playerName}}. That thunder gave me a start, do you feel scared living on the farm alone?
generic.mid.spring.storm.night.3: Gosh, the lightning lit up the whole night sky. Don't hang around outside this late, hurry inside!
generic.mid.spring.storm.night.4: The wind and rain are wild tonight, {{playerName}}. If the wind on the road is too strong, go take shelter in the saloon first.
generic.mid.spring.storm.night.5: Good evening! Never go fishing when it's thundering, it would be terrible if the fishing rod conducted electricity, listen to me and go home quickly.
generic.mid.summer.sun.afternoon.1: Whew... good afternoon, {{playerName}}. It's way too hot, feels like I'm about to melt completely.
generic.mid.summer.sun.afternoon.2: Good afternoon! This kind of weather calls for a swim behind Marnie's ranch, don't you think?
generic.mid.summer.sun.afternoon.3: Hey, {{playerName}}, good afternoon. I'm just about to grab an ice cream, want one too?
generic.mid.summer.sun.afternoon.4: This sun is going to dry up all the crops in the ground! {{playerName}}, make sure to stay hydrated.
generic.mid.summer.sun.afternoon.5: Whew... feels like the soles of my shoes are burning just stepping on the asphalt, I wish summer would pass quickly.
generic.mid.summer.rain.night.1: A heavy rain is actually nice, at least it washes away a lot of that summer night mugginess.
generic.mid.summer.rain.night.2: Good evening, {{playerName}}. Listening to the rain finally cools things down, should be able to get a good sleep tonight.
generic.mid.summer.rain.night.3: The sound of heavy rain hitting the banana leaves is so nice. Working outside this late?
generic.mid.summer.rain.night.4: Good evening! Summer rainy nights have a strange romance to them, don't you think the air has an extra scent of fresh earth?
generic.mid.summer.rain.night.5: Hey, {{playerName}}, the rain is coming down so hard and your clothes are completely soaked, hurry home and take a hot bath.
generic.mid.summer.greenrain.morning.1: Gosh, {{playerName}}! Look outside, all the trees have mutated! This moss rain is so amazing, right?
generic.mid.summer.greenrain.morning.2: Good morning, {{playerName}}! This green rain is unbelievable, did any strange big trees show up on your farm?
generic.mid.summer.greenrain.morning.3: Morning! Even though the news said the rain isn't toxic, seeing the whole world in green light still feels a bit unreal.
generic.mid.summer.greenrain.morning.4: Good morning, {{playerName}}. Everyone is hiding away today, but I heard you can forage quite a lot of good stuff from the bushes outside?
generic.mid.summer.greenrain.morning.5: Heavens, this rain turned the world into a massive jungle! Good morning, are you ready to go exploring outside today?
generic.mid.summer.greenrain.afternoon.1: Even though everyone is a bit scared of this green rain, those strange plants are actually pretty cool, right?
generic.mid.summer.greenrain.afternoon.2: Good afternoon, {{playerName}}. I noticed you can get special wood from chopping down those mutated trees, have you tried it?
generic.mid.summer.greenrain.afternoon.3: Hello! Walking in the green fog makes me feel like I'm playing some magic-themed RPG game.
generic.mid.summer.greenrain.afternoon.4: Good afternoon. The whole town seems a bit on edge because of this rain, but getting to see such a spectacle counts as a win.
generic.mid.summer.greenrain.afternoon.5: Hey, {{playerName}}. These tentacle plants look weird, but they seem to have quite a lot of vitality, truly amazing.
generic.mid.fall.sun.afternoon.1: Autumn afternoons are always warm and cozy. Watching the leaves fall makes life feel slower.
generic.mid.fall.sun.afternoon.2: Good afternoon, {{playerName}}! How are the pumpkins growing this year? I'm already looking forward to Spirit's Eve.
generic.mid.fall.sun.afternoon.3: The autumn wind rustles the leaves, and it crunches beneath your feet, taking a walk in the afternoon is the best.
generic.mid.fall.sun.afternoon.4: Good afternoon! The autumn sun isn't piercing, but it feels most comfortable on you, perfect for spacing out.
generic.mid.fall.sun.afternoon.5: Hey, {{playerName}}. Autumn is Pelican Town's most beautiful season, hope your farm gets a full harvest this quarter too.
generic.mid.fall.rain.morning.1: Good morning. Every autumn rain brings the cold, remember to wear an extra layer of clothes when going out from today on.
generic.mid.fall.rain.morning.2: Morning, {{playerName}}. This continuous autumn rain makes one feel a bit sentimental.
generic.mid.fall.rain.morning.3: Good morning! The temperature drops so fast on rainy days, seeing you dressed so lightly, make sure you don't catch a cold.
generic.mid.fall.rain.morning.4: Good morning! Even though the weather is freezing, just seeing you makes my morning way brighter.
generic.mid.fall.rain.morning.5: Hey, {{playerName}}, morning. Still going to work in the fields on a rainy day? Remember to drink more hot water.
generic.mid.fall.night.1: Good evening! Taking a stroll on an autumn night is quite pleasant, though the wind is indeed a bit chilly.
generic.mid.fall.night.2: Good evening, {{playerName}}. The night sky is exceptionally high and distant tonight, the stars are very bright too, perfect for stargazing.
generic.mid.fall.night.3: Running around for farm matters this late? Stay safe on your way back.
generic.mid.fall.night.4: Hey, {{playerName}}. Autumn nights are always quiet, hearing your footsteps made me think it was some small animal, haha.
generic.mid.fall.night.5: Good evening! It's getting colder and colder, finish your walk and head home early to start up the fireplace.
generic.mid.winter.snow.afternoon.1: It's snowing! The whole Pelican Town is blanketed in white, beautiful like a fairy tale world, right?
generic.mid.winter.snow.afternoon.2: Good afternoon, {{playerName}}! Want to go build a snowman in the square later? I can help you roll the snowballs!
generic.mid.winter.snow.afternoon.3: An afternoon with drifting snow is so quiet, feels like time has stopped. Good afternoon, did you go catch any winter-exclusive fish today?
generic.mid.winter.snow.afternoon.4: Good afternoon, {{playerName}}. Stepping on the snow sounds super satisfying, want to go for a walk by the lake together?
generic.mid.winter.snow.afternoon.5: Hey! Walking out in the snow makes me way more clear-headed, but make sure to wear your gloves properly.
generic.mid.winter.sun.morning.1: The warm sun in winter is the most comfortable. Morning, {{playerName}}, any plans today?
generic.mid.winter.sun.morning.2: Good morning, {{playerName}}! Even though the sun is out, the snow hasn't melted yet, the road is a bit slippery, be careful walking.
generic.mid.winter.sun.morning.3: Good morning! Seeing the winter sun makes me feel completely healed. You're up early today too?
generic.mid.winter.sun.morning.4: Morning! The sun shining on the snow looks sparkling, like crushed diamonds. How about going down the mines to try your luck today?
generic.mid.winter.sun.morning.5: Good morning, {{playerName}}. Clear days in winter are rare, hope you have a pleasant day in town!
generic.mid.winter.snow.night.1: At this hour, it's way too cold outside at night, hurry into the saloon for a drink to warm up!
generic.mid.winter.snow.night.2: Good evening, {{playerName}}. The wind outside is strong enough to blow someone away, why are you still lingering in the snow?
generic.mid.winter.snow.night.3: This late, the temperature outside must have dropped to freezing point. Head back to the farm, don't freeze out there.
generic.mid.winter.snow.night.4: Good evening! The town under the streetlights on a snowy night looks extra cozy. But if you don't go home, you'll turn into an ice sculpture.
generic.mid.winter.snow.night.5: Hey, {{playerName}}, tonight's blizzard seems to be getting worse, head home quickly, talk tomorrow!
generic.high.spring.sun.morning.1: Hey, my best friend! Getting to see you first thing in a new day makes me feel incredibly lucky!
generic.high.spring.sun.morning.2: Morning, {{playerName}}! Last night I dreamt you took me to the Egg Festival, haha, need any help with anything today?
generic.high.spring.sun.morning.3: Good morning! Just seeing your energetic face makes me feel like everything I do today will go super smoothly!
generic.high.spring.sun.morning.4: Hey! {{playerName}}! It's a waste not to go for a walk in the forest with me on such a beautiful spring morning!
generic.high.spring.sun.morning.5: Good morning, my good partner! If the farm work gets too tiring, call me anytime, don't push through it alone!
generic.high.spring.rain.afternoon.1: Haha, {{playerName}}! Even a rainy day couldn't stop us from crossing paths, want to come over to my place later?
generic.high.spring.rain.afternoon.2: Good afternoon, {{playerName}}! Even if the whole town is drowsy because of the rain, as long as you're here, everywhere is full of laughter!
generic.high.spring.rain.afternoon.3: Hey! Rainy days are great! Now that you don't have to water, you finally have time to chat with me, right? See you at the saloon later!
generic.high.spring.rain.afternoon.4: Good afternoon! Though the rain is heavy, running into you at the street corner instantly cleared up my mood!
generic.high.spring.rain.afternoon.5: Haha, looks like your clothes are almost soaked through. Come, borrow an umbrella from my place, and have a cup of hot tea while you're at it!
generic.high.spring.night.1: Good evening! The night scenery and sky are truly lovely tonight, too bad you have to rush back to the farm to sleep.
generic.high.spring.night.2: Hey, {{playerName}}, good evening! How did today go? After a busy day, just completely let go and unwind tonight.
generic.high.spring.night.3: Bumping into you this late is the best surprise tonight! Want me to walk with you for a bit on your way back?
generic.high.spring.night.4: Good evening! The night breeze feels quite nice, have time to catch some air on the bridge behind the carpenter's shop? I happen to be heading that way too.
generic.high.spring.night.5: Haha, feels like I always catch you whenever I wander town late at night, our chemistry is unmatched! Get some rest early!
generic.high.summer.sun.afternoon.1: Yo, {{playerName}}! Good afternoon! With the sun this big, let me treat you to one when we pass the ice cream stand!
generic.high.summer.sun.afternoon.2: Good afternoon, my super farmer! This temperature is terrifying, hurry and rest under the shade with me, safety first!
generic.high.summer.sun.afternoon.3: Hey, {{playerName}}! I heard your farm's water tank is full? It's so hot today, how about we go dip our feet at the beach later?
generic.high.summer.sun.afternoon.4: Good afternoon! With the blazing sun out, seeing you still running all over town makes me truly admire your stamina and drive!
generic.high.summer.sun.afternoon.5: Whew... it's so hot even Gus doesn't want to light up the stove. Come, let me buy you a cold juice, let's go hit the saloon fans!
Look at these massive moss trees! The other villagers are hiding at home, I knew only a fellow like you would run outside to adventure!
Good afternoon, {{playerName}}! This magical green rain scared the whole town, but I think the two of us can achieve something big in it!
Haha, doesn't this green rain feel like the opening of some apocalyptic game? So cool! Let's go check out the Secret Woods together!
Good afternoon! The whole town is worried about the end of the world, only the two of us are excitedly studying this mutated moss, truly my best friend!
Hey, {{playerName}}! This green rain is practically a miracle of nature! Quick, while no one's around, let's gather more mutated materials in town!
generic.high.summer.storm.night.1: Wow! That lightning was intense! {{playerName}}, quick, take cover under the eaves with me, don't stay under the trees!
generic.high.summer.storm.night.2: Good evening! The thunder is loud as a cannon, I was just worrying about the lightning rods on your farm, you okay?
generic.high.summer.storm.night.3: Heavens, that lightning almost hit the utility pole nearby! Stop wandering outside, come inside with me to warm up!
generic.high.summer.storm.night.4: The wind and rain are way too violent tonight, {{playerName}}! Your roof isn't leaking, is it? If you're scared, come find me anytime!
generic.high.summer.storm.night.5: Good evening! Look at you, soaked like a drowned rat, put on this dry coat quickly, don't catch a cold, I'd worry!
generic.high.fall.sun.afternoon.1: The harvest season is here! Those giant crops you grew are simply amazing, really proud of you!
generic.high.fall.sun.afternoon.2: Good afternoon, {{playerName}}! The autumn sun shining on the farm must look absolutely beautiful, right? When are you taking me for a tour?
Good afternoon, {{playerName}}! The autumn sun shining on the farm must look absolutely beautiful, right? When are you taking me for a tour?
generic.high.fall.sun.afternoon.3: Hey! You're definitely taking first place at the Stardew Valley Fair this year! I have absolute confidence in you!
generic.high.fall.sun.afternoon.4: Good afternoon! The autumn breeze puts one in a great mood, seeing you carrying a full harvest today, we must celebrate tonight!
generic.high.fall.sun.afternoon.5: Haha, {{playerName}}, seeing you make big money this year makes me happier than getting rich myself, you're the best!
generic.high.fall.rain.night.1: Raining hard this late and you're still out running around? Take this umbrella, absolutely don't catch a cold.
generic.high.fall.rain.night.2: Good evening, {{playerName}}. Late autumn rainy nights are freezing to the bone, just thinking about you out here makes me want to come find you.
generic.high.fall.rain.night.3: Such heavy rain and not a soul on the street, getting to run into you at a time like this makes the whole rainy night feel not cold at all.
generic.high.fall.rain.night.4: Good evening! Look at all the mud on your shoes, head back to the farm and change into clean clothes, don't make me worry about you all the time.
generic.high.fall.rain.night.5: Hey, the rain is too heavy and visibility is poor, yet you're still running around. Quick, take my hand, I'll walk you to the farm gates!
generic.high.winter.snow.morning.1: Wow, a snowy morning! Seeing you in such high spirits instantly fills me with energy too!
generic.high.winter.snow.morning.2: Morning, {{playerName}}! The snow is so thick, want to go mining later? Winter is perfect for hitting the shafts!
generic.high.winter.snow.morning.3: Good morning! Look at the snow caught on your eyelashes, haha, too cute, quick, come inside and warm up!
generic.high.winter.snow.morning.4: Hey, my best friend! Although winter mornings are freezing cold, getting to say morning to you makes my heart feel totally warm!
generic.high.winter.snow.morning.5: Good morning! How are the preparations for the Ice Festival today? We definitely have to bring back the ice fishing championship title later!
generic.high.winter.sun.afternoon.1: Good afternoon! Though winter is cold, as long as I can chat about everything under the sun with you, my heart feels all warm.
generic.high.winter.sun.afternoon.2: Good afternoon, {{playerName}}. Clear days in winter are perfect for sitting on a bench to sunbathe, come sit with me for a bit?
generic.high.winter.sun.afternoon.3: Hey! The sun shining on the snow is blindingly bright. Didn't go help Gus haul firewood today? Let's go together later?
generic.high.winter.sun.afternoon.4: Good afternoon! Though you can't farm in winter, seeing you helping everyone around town makes you truly the pride of our town!
generic.high.winter.sun.afternoon.5: Haha, {{playerName}}, the winter wind can't blow away the vitality on you, every time I see you I feel extra happy!
generic.high.winter.snow.night.1: It's a total blizzard outside right now, lucky I ran into you indoors. Come, let's warm up by the hearth fire together!
generic.high.winter.snow.night.2: Good evening, {{playerName}}! Tonight's blizzard is too fierce, don't head back to the farm, just crash on my couch tonight, yeah?
generic.high.winter.snow.night.3: Heavens, it's this late and the road outside is almost buried in snow. Absolutely don't get lost on your way home, send a message when you arrive!
generic.high.winter.snow.night.4: Good evening! The fireplace in the saloon burns brightest on snowy nights, come, my treat, let's grab a hot ale to shake off the fatigue!
generic.high.winter.snow.night.5: In weather this cold, your face is freezing blue out there. Quick, take my scarf and wear it, don't be polite with me, look who we are!
generic.love.spring.sun.morning.1: Good morning, my darling. A new day has started, getting to see you first makes me feel truly blessed.
generic.love.spring.sun.morning.2: Morning, dear. The spring sunshine is beautiful, but... in my eyes, it's not blindingly radiant like you at all. *blushes*
generic.love.spring.sun.morning.3: Good morning, {{playerName}}. I wanted to see you the moment I opened my eyes, to think we actually met at the street corner, is this telepathy?
generic.love.spring.sun.morning.4: Good morning! Seeing you heading to work on the farm so early, I really want to turn into a breeze on your straw hat, accompanying you all day.
generic.love.spring.sun.morning.5: Hey, good morning. For the rest of the day, my mind will probably be completely filled with your figure again, I really can't help myself around you.
generic.love.spring.rain.afternoon.1: The spring rain weaves so finely... it would be nice if time slowed down while strolling under an umbrella with you.
generic.love.spring.rain.afternoon.2: Good afternoon, dear. The rain wet the flowers and grass, but as long as I can hold your hand, my world is entirely sunny.
generic.love.spring.rain.afternoon.3: Hey, {{playerName}}. Everyone finds rainy days gloomy, but I think this is a perfect date day just for the two of us.
generic.love.spring.rain.afternoon.4: Good afternoon. The rain outside is so heavy, let's take cover under the eaves ahead? I want to... be a bit closer to you. *whispers*
generic.love.spring.rain.afternoon.5: Look at your shoulders, they got wet from the rain, lean in closer, my umbrella is large enough to shield you from the wind and rain for a lifetime.
generic.love.spring.night.1: Hey... the moon is beautiful tonight. Finished with farm work, can I walk with you for a stretch?
generic.love.spring.night.2: Good evening, dear. Hard work today. Tonight's night breeze is soft and gentle, just like the feeling you give me.
generic.love.spring.night.3: It's this late, I'm really reluctant to let you go back to the farm... stay with me under the stars for five more minutes, okay?
generic.love.spring.night.4: Good evening, {{playerName}}. It's late, hold my hand, that way no matter how dark the road is, I won't let you get lost.
generic.love.spring.night.5: Every time I look into your eyes at night, I feel like I'm about to fall right in. Have a beautiful dream with me in it tonight.
generic.love.summer.sun.afternoon.1: Good afternoon, dear! Though the sunshine is a bit sultry, as long as you're by my side, even the air tastes sweet.
generic.love.summer.sun.afternoon.2: Good afternoon, {{playerName}}. Look at you sweating all over, come here, let me help wipe your sweat with a handkerchief. *worried*
generic.love.summer.sun.afternoon.3: Whew... this big sun is going to melt people, but my feelings for you are definitely hotter than this summer temperature!
generic.love.summer.sun.afternoon.4: Good afternoon! I specially brought you a cold juice when passing the saloon, take a sip quickly, don't overheat yourself.
generic.love.summer.sun.afternoon.5: Hey, dear. On such a hot afternoon, if I could lie on the beach catching the sea breeze with you, that would absolutely be the most romantic thing in the world.
This green rain looks a bit scary... but as long as I hold your hand tightly, I'm not afraid at all.
Good afternoon, dear. Though the world has turned strange, as long as I can see you the moment I turn my head, I feel very at ease.
Hey, {{playerName}}. Everyone is hiding at home, getting to have a secret date with you in the green fog feels like eloping. *giggles*
Good afternoon! Look at those mutated flowers, they're weird but quite pretty, just like you, always bringing me unexpected surprises.
Don't be afraid, this green rain is no big deal. I will always be by your side to protect you, both now and in the future.
generic.love.summer.storm.night.1: Ah! That thunder was so loud... can I borrow your shoulder to lean on? Just for a moment. *with a blushed face*
generic.love.summer.storm.night.2: Good evening, dear. The lightning outside is terrifying, the moment I heard the thunder, the only thing in my mind was seeing you quickly.
generic.love.summer.storm.night.3: The strong wind is blowing leaves all over, promise me to lock the doors and windows well after returning to the farm, I'll be worrying about you.
generic.love.summer.storm.night.4: Good evening, {{playerName}}. This thunderous night is too wild, hurry into my arms, that way you won't hear any frightening sounds.
generic.love.summer.storm.night.5: The louder the thunder, the tighter I want to hold you instead. Don't catch a cold tonight, my heart is completely filled with you.
generic.love.fall.sun.afternoon.1: Autumn afternoons are the gentlest. If you're not busy, can we go sit by the lake behind the carpenter's shop?
generic.love.fall.sun.afternoon.2: Good afternoon, dear. Watching the golden fallen leaves carpet the town, the thing I want to do most is walk side-by-side on them with you.
generic.love.fall.sun.afternoon.3: Hey, {{playerName}}. The autumn sunshine is warm and cozy, shining on your profile, it's so beautiful I can't look away.
generic.love.fall.sun.afternoon.4: Good afternoon! The farm brought a great harvest this year, so... is it time for the feelings between us to reach harvest season too? *bashful*
generic.love.fall.sun.afternoon.5: The autumn wind is a bit chilly, but once I hold your hand, I feel the warmest place in the whole world is right in my palm.
generic.love.fall.rain.night.1: Meeting you on a rainy night like this, it feels like the world under the umbrella suddenly only has the two of us left...
generic.love.fall.rain.night.2: Good evening, my love. Cold rain beats against the window, but with you standing before me, it feels like a bonfire was lit in my heart.
generic.love.fall.rain.night.3: So late and it's still raining cold rain, look at you, your lips are pale from freezing, come here, let me warm you with my body heat. *holds you*
generic.love.fall.rain.night.4: Good evening, {{playerName}}. The town on rainy nights is very quiet, but getting to share an umbrella with you on the way home, I hope this road never ends.
generic.love.fall.rain.night.5: Listening to the pattering rain, looking at your smiling face, suddenly this terrible rainy night turned into my favorite day.
generic.love.winter.snow.morning.1: Good morning! Look at your hands and ears, they're frozen all red... come here, let me use my hands to warm them up for you.
generic.love.winter.snow.morning.2: Morning, dear. Winter mornings are white blankets everywhere, yet that warm color on you can be found by me at a single glance.
generic.love.winter.snow.morning.3: Good morning, {{playerName}}. Though snowy mornings are cold, just thinking about getting to see you today makes me willing to part even with my blanket.
generic.love.winter.snow.morning.4: Good morning! Look, snowflakes landed on your hair, just like white hair... haha, does this count as us growing old together ahead of time?
generic.love.winter.snow.morning.5: Winter mornings, even the air is icy, yet a single smile from you can make my world instantly bloom into spring.
generic.love.winter.sun.afternoon.1: The winter sun landing on you makes you look just like a winter elf, so beautiful I can't look away.
generic.love.winter.sun.afternoon.2: Good afternoon, dear. Clear days in winter are perfect for dates, let's go for a stroll on the beach treading residual snow later, okay?
generic.love.winter.sun.afternoon.3: Hey, {{playerName}}, good afternoon. Though the sun is out, the wind is still very mean. Quick, share half my scarf!
generic.love.winter.sun.afternoon.4: Good afternoon! Seeing you walking towards me, it feels like the winter snow completely melted into sweet syrup in an instant.
generic.love.winter.sun.afternoon.5: The warm sun in winter, plus my favorite you, this afternoon is probably the most perfect time I've spent this year.
generic.love.winter.snow.night.1: It's so cold, the snow is so big... but just thinking of you, my bad mood for the whole day completely disappears.
generic.love.winter.snow.night.2: Good evening, my darling. The snowy night outside is quiet, so quiet I can even clearly hear the sound of my heart beating for you.
generic.love.winter.snow.night.3: This late, the blizzard is so big you can't even see the road clearly. Promise me, don't head back to the farm tonight, stay by my side, okay? *with earnest eyes*
generic.love.winter.snow.night.4: Good evening, {{playerName}}. Look at all the frost on your eyelashes, truly a worrisome little cutie, come inside, I'll make you hot cocoa.
generic.love.winter.snow.night.5: Even if it's snowing goose feathers outside cold enough to freeze someone stiff, as long as I'm with you, I feel like a summer is forever hidden in my heart.
generic.spouse.spring.sun.morning.1: Good morning, dear. Did you sleep well last night? I've already prepared breakfast, don't push yourself too hard at the farm today either.
generic.spouse.spring.sun.morning.2: Good morning, my other half. A new day has started, I've already filled up the water tank for you, have a happy day at the farm today too!
generic.spouse.spring.sun.morning.3: Morning, {{playerName}}. Getting to feel your pillow the moment I open my eyes, this feeling makes me feel incredibly happy no matter how long it's been.
generic.spouse.spring.sun.morning.4: Good morning, dear! Seeing you full of drive first thing in the morning, truly fits the title of Stardew Valley's best farmer, give me a kiss before you head out?
generic.spouse.spring.sun.morning.5: Good morning! The crops in the field theoretically should be watered today, but don't worry, I've already taken care of it for you, spend more time with me today?
generic.spouse.spring.rain.afternoon.1: The rain is getting heavier outside, and you specially ran back to see me... silly, put on a coat quickly so you don't catch a cold.
generic.spouse.spouse.spring.rain.aftern: Good afternoon, dear. No need to busy yourself in the fields on rainy days, how about I make your favorite snacks when we get home later?
generic.spouse.spring.rain.afternoon.3: Hey, {{playerName}}, good afternoon. The spring rain washed our farm's fruit trees beautifully, but your clothes are all wet, come home and change with me.
generic.spouse.spring.rain.afternoon.4: Good afternoon, my love. Rainy afternoons are perfect for drawing the curtains and snuggling on the couch, let's put farm work aside for today.
generic.spouse.spring.rain.afternoon.5: The rain pitter-patters, reminding me of when we first got married. Good afternoon, I've been thinking of you all day.
generic.spouse.spring.night.1: Welcome home, my love. Hard work today, I've already drawn the bathwater, go wash off the fatigue quickly.
generic.spouse.spring.night.2: Good evening, {{playerName}}. Working until this late before returning, you must be starving? Sit down, the food is keeping warm in the pot.
generic.spouse.spring.night.3: You're finally back! Without you home, the big house feels completely empty. Come over and let me hold you to recharge. *nuzzles you*
generic.spouse.spring.night.4: Good evening, dear. The night sky is exceptionally mild tonight, let's turn off the porch light later and watch the stars together on the veranda.
generic.spouse.spring.night.5: Shaking off the day's fatigue and returning to our safe haven with you, this is exactly the most perfect life I can think of. Good night, dear.
generic.spouse.summer.sun.afternoon.1: Whew, this big sun... good afternoon, dear. The crops in the field are important, but absolutely don't give yourself heatstroke, I'll worry.
generic.spouse.summer.sun.afternoon.2: Good afternoon, my great farmer. Such blistering sunshine and you specially ran back to the big house to see me, take a sip of cold beer to cool down.
generic.spouse.summer.sun.afternoon.3: Whew... good afternoon. I went to check on the melons in the field, they're growing excellently. But compared to melons, I care more whether you wore sun protection properly.
generic.spouse.summer.sun.afternoon.4: Hey, dear, good afternoon. The summer sun is pure suffering, how about we go catch the breeze and watch the bonfire at the beach together after sunset?
generic.spouse.summer.sun.afternoon.5: Look at all the sweat on your back, your clothes are sticking to you. Come inside, I'll get a towel to wipe you down, don't go out for the afternoon.
generic.spouse.summer.greenrain.afternoo: This green moss rain made a mess of the place, but it's fine, we'll clean it up together once it clears up, as long as you're safe.
Good afternoon, dear. The strange rain outside scared the animals, luckily our home is sturdy enough to protect you safely inside.
Hey, {{playerName}}. Even if the whole world is glowing with creepy green light, as long as I can hold your hand at home, I feel like there's nothing to fear.
Good afternoon! Word says this rain helps with certain mutations for crops, though it's strange? Still, I only hope you don't go off adventuring in dangerous places.
Look at you covered in green moss brought back from outside, haha, like a bush monster. Go wash up quickly, just leave the clothes to me.
generic.spouse.summer.storm.night.1: The rain and thunder sound so loud outside... I will keep holding you tonight, sleep peacefully, I'm here.
generic.spouse.summer.storm.night.2: Good evening, dear. Tonight's lightning is too wild, our farm's lightning rods should hold up. Don't worry, I'm right here with you.
generic.spouse.summer.storm.night.3: That thunder was loud! Gave me a start. Quick, hold me tight, let's listen to the heavy rain tonight and sleep soundly in our warm bed.
generic.spouse.summer.storm.night.4: Good evening, {{playerName}}. Wind and rain are raging outside the window, but as long as I can turn around and touch your warm body, I feel the safest place in the world is right here.
generic.spouse.summer.storm.night.5: On a thundery night this scary, lucky we're already married, no need to be scared all alone in an empty house anymore, right?
generic.spouse.fall.sun.afternoon.1: Good afternoon, dear! What do you want to eat tonight? I'm planning to make a thick soup with the fresh pumpkin you just harvested.
generic.spouse.fall.sun.afternoon.2: Good afternoon, my love. The autumn sunshine looks lovely on our farm porch, come sit on the rocking chair and rock with me for a bit later.
generic.spouse.fall.sun.afternoon.3: Hey, {{playerName}}. The autumn wind is getting stronger, I brought out the winter clothes to air them, try them on to see if they fit?
generic.spouse.fall.sun.afternoon.4: Good afternoon! Seeing you manage the farm so systematically this year, I am truly incredibly proud, marrying you was the best decision of my life.
generic.spouse.fall.sun.afternoon.5: Fallen leaves covered our yard completely. Let's tidy up the yard together later when we're not busy, then go have a grand feast at the saloon!
generic.spouse.fall.rain.night.1: Wind and rain are raging outside, but as long as a warm light is lit with you at home, this place is the safest haven under heaven.
generic.spouse.fall.rain.night.2: Good evening, dear. Late autumn rainy nights are cold like winter, drink this cup of freshly brewed hot milk tea quickly to warm your body.
generic.spouse.fall.rain.night.3: This late and the rain outside keeps getting heavier, look at you freezing cold all over. Change out of those wet clothes, don't make me worry.
generic.spouse.fall.rain.night.4: Good evening, {{playerName}}. Listening to the rain beating against our roof makes our little home feel cozier than ever.
generic.spouse.fall.rain.night.5: The weather is terrible tonight, luckily you're safely home. Come, sit by the fire, I'll help dry your hair.
generic.spouse.winter.snow.morning.1: Mmm... good morning. The snow outside fell all night, it's too cold, I really want to hold you a bit longer in bed...
generic.spouse.winter.snow.morning.2: Good morning, my darling. The fields are full of snow accumulation, don't go out catching the cold wind today, stay home and watch TV with me, okay?
generic.spouse.winter.snow.morning.3: Morning, {{playerName}}. Seeing the white blanket outside the moment I open my eyes while you're right in my arms, this is probably the most perfect winter morning.
generic.spouse.winter.snow.morning.4: Morning! The outside temperature has frozen into ice blocks. I've already lit the fireplace and breakfast is warm on the stove, eat up before you get busy.
generic.spouse.winter.snow.morning.5: Mmm... good morning, dear. Seeing you burrow into my arms because of the cold is so cute, come, stretch your feet over, I'll help warm them up.
generic.spouse.winter.sun.afternoon.1: Good afternoon. The firewood for the fireplace indoors is almost running low, let me walk with you to chop wood later, don't tire yourself out alone.
generic.spouse.winter.sun.afternoon.2: Good afternoon, dear. The winter sun shines warm in the living room, I'm just planning to vacuum the carpet, you must be exhausted today?
generic.spouse.winter.sun.afternoon.3: Hey, {{playerName}}, good afternoon. Seeing you return from the freezing snow, sit down, I just used the apples stored from the farm to brew hot apple cider, take a sip quickly.
generic.spouse.winter.sun.afternoon.4: Good afternoon! Though it's very cold outside, the moment I return to a home with you, even the air is sweet, feels completely healed.
generic.spouse.winter.sun.afternoon.5: Though the winter sun is brief, as long as I can stand side-by-side at the window watching the snow scene with you, I feel it doesn't matter if time passes slowly.
generic.spouse.winter.snow.night.1: Dear, the snow outside is coming down too hard. Come home quickly, hot cocoa is already warming in the pot, just waiting for you.
generic.spouse.winter.snow.night.2: Good evening, {{playerName}}. Listen to that blizzard sound outside, how terrifying. Come inside and pull the door shut, we're nowhere bound tonight.
generic.spouse.winter.snow.night.3: You're finally back! I looked out the door several times, the snow is so thick, I was really worried you'd slip. Take off your coat quickly, the fire is burning bright.
generic.spouse.winter.snow.night.4: Good evening, my love. Outside is cold like an ice cellar tonight, but our bedroom has a fireplace and you, it's practically the warmest place under heaven.
generic.spouse.winter.snow.night.5: Late snowy nights are the quietest. Dear, after a whole year of hard work, let's think of nothing tonight, hit the bed early and sleep in each other's arms.
npc.Shane.low.generic.1: Do I know you? Don't strike up a conversation with me.
npc.Shane.low.generic.2: If you don't have anything else, can you leave me alone? I'm busy.
npc.Shane.low.generic.3: Heh... another boring day. What do you actually want from me? So annoying.
npc.Shane.low.generic.4: Don't get too close to me, I haven't the slightest interest in making new friends.
npc.Shane.low.generic.5: (sigh) Don't you have your own farm work to do? Stop staring at me.
npc.Shane.low.spring.sun.morning.1: Morning. Whether the weather is good today has nothing to do with me, I just want to finish this cup of coffee quickly and go to work.
npc.Shane.low.spring.sun.morning.2: Good morning. Farmer, did you wake up this early just to come and disturb my peace?
npc.Shane.low.spring.sun.morning.3: Morning. I have to go stock shelves at JojaMart later, haven't got time to stand here chitchatted with you.
npc.Shane.low.spring.sun.morning.4: This full of energy first thing in the morning? Must be nice. Right now I just want to vanish on the spot, stop looking at me.
npc.Shane.low.spring.sun.morning.5: Oh, morning. The morning sun is way too bright, makes my head ache. I'm leaving first.
npc.Haley.low.generic.1: Ugh... what is that smell on you? Is it horse manure or mud? Gross.
npc.Haley.low.generic.2: Sorry, I'm kind of busy right now.
npc.Haley.low.generic.3: Did you pick your clothes out of a trash dump? Completely devoid of fashion sense, so tacky.
npc.Haley.low.generic.4: Ah! Don't just float over out of nowhere and talk to me, it'd be super awkward if someone saw me with you.
npc.Haley.low.summer.sun.afternoon.1: Good afternoon. Heavens, this summer sun is going to tan my skin! Seems like I didn't bring enough sunscreen!
npc.Haley.low.summer.sun.afternoon.2: Good afternoon. So hot, so hot! My bangs are totally ruined by sweat, simply exasperating!
npc.Haley.low.summer.sun.afternoon.3: Uh, you walk around the farm under a sun this big and don't even use an umbrella? No wonder your skin is so rough.
npc.Haley.low.summer.sun.afternoon.4: Heavens! My limited-edition sandals stepped into mud! Blame this stupid town's awful roads! Stop talking to me, so annoying!
npc.Haley.low.summer.sun.afternoon.5: Whew... good afternoon. The ice cream at Gus's was actually sold out, today is just total bad luck, don't bother me.
npc.Sebastian.low.generic.1: ...Uh, hi. Need something? If not, I want to head back to the basement.
npc.Sebastian.low.generic.2: I don't really like chatting with people I'm not familiar with, sorry.
npc.Sebastian.low.generic.3: I was just conceptualizing the underlying architecture of my code, and you completely disrupted it by interrupting... forget it, whatever.
npc.Sebastian.low.generic.5: Are you usually this idle on the farm? I still have a lot of online freelance commissions to handle, excuse me.
npc.Sebastian.low.fall.rain.night.1: Good evening. Autumn rainy nights are best spent alone, aren't you cold coming out this late?
npc.Sebastian.low.fall.rain.night.2: ...I just came out to smoke a cigarette and catch the rain view, don't want to engage in any meaningless socializing.
npc.Sebastian.low.fall.rain.night.3: Raining late at night, the streetlights look pretty nice. But... you staring at me like that makes me feel very uncomfortable.
npc.Sebastian.low.fall.rain.night.4: The rain soaked my cigarette butt... tsk. I'm heading back to my room, bye.
npc.Sebastian.low.fall.rain.night.5: Good evening. In this awful weather, probably only you would be wandering around outside in the middle of the night.
